title: Tez Code Review Finding
description: Schema for individual code review findings within a code review profile tez

id.description: Unique finding identifier within the code review.

severity.description: Severity level of the finding (Profile section 4.2).

category.description: Category classifying the type of finding. Standard categories per Profile section 4.3: security, correctness, performance, reliability, testing, maintainability, style, documentation, architecture, compatibility. Custom categories SHOULD use a namespaced format such as 'com.acme.custom-category'.

observation_type.description: The type of observation this finding represents. Added in v0.2.0 to support praise, questions, and notes alongside issues.

title.description: Short human-readable title summarizing the finding.
examples: SQL injection vulnerability in user search
Missing null check on response object

description.description: Detailed explanation of the finding, including context, impact, and rationale.
examples: The user search endpoint constructs SQL queries using string concatenation with unsanitized user input, allowing arbitrary SQL injection.

status.description: Current status of the finding in the review workflow (Profile section 4.4). Transitions are tracked through the fork mechanism.

location.description: Source code location where the finding applies (Profile section 4.1).

file.description: Relative file path within the repository.

line_start.description: Starting line number of the relevant code.

line_end.description: Ending line number of the relevant code.

column_start.description: Starting column number of the relevant code.

column_end.description: Ending column number of the relevant code.

function.description: Name of the function or method containing the finding.

class.description: Name of the class containing the finding.

suggestion.description: Suggested fix or improvement for the finding.

description.description: Human-readable description of the suggested change.
examples: Use parameterized queries instead of string concatenation.

code.description: Code snippet demonstrating the suggested fix.
examples: const results = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = $1', [searchTerm]);

diff.description: Suggested change in unified diff format.

rendering_hint.description: Hint for how the suggestion should be rendered in a UI. Added in v0.2.0.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the finding, particularly relevant for AI-generated reviews. Added in v0.2.0.

confidence_reasoning.description: Explanation of why the reviewer assigned the given confidence level. Added in v0.2.0.
examples: Pattern matches known SQL injection vulnerability with direct string concatenation of user input.

citations.description: Citation strings linking the finding to context items in the tez (Profile section 4.1).

related_findings.description: Identifiers of related findings within the same review (Profile section 4.1).

references.description: External reference URLs supporting the finding (Profile section 4.1).

tags.description: Optional tags for additional categorization or filtering. Not defined in Profile section 4.1; retained for backward compatibility with earlier versions of this schema.
